title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: Do you enjoy spending time outdoors? What do you like to do?
What's the natural environment like near where you live?
Are you concerned about climate change? What do you personally do about it?
Do you prefer the mountains, the sea or the countryside? Why?
How has the environment in your area changed over the years?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think individuals can really make a difference to the environment?
What do you think is the most important change that needs to happen to protect nature?
Do you feel optimistic or pessimistic about the future of our planet?
